message:
Restructure XML parsing tests to use this assignment

Change tests to use `this = x.parse_...()` pattern instead of
`y = x.parse_...()` for cleaner baselines that show the actual
parsed output.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
